hooks.command: echo '=== GIT NOTES (read these before doing anything) ===' && git log --notes=refs/notes/agent --format='%h %s%n%N' -10 && echo '=== ADR LIST ===' && ls docs/adr/ && echo '=== REMINDER: You MUST read relevant ADRs before writing code. Write a git note after every commit. ==='

FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null) && if [ -n "$FILE" ] && git ls-files --error-unmatch "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; then echo "=== RECENT CHANGES TO $FILE ==="; git log --notes=refs/notes/agent --format='%h %s (%ar)%n%N' -5 -- "$FILE"; fi
